name: Standard/Queen Medium/Firm Memory Foam & Down Alternative Firm Bed Pillow - Casaluna™
description:
Drift off to sleep in luxurious comfort with this 3-Pack Memory Foam & Down Alternative Firm Bed Pillow from Casaluna™. This set includes three rectangular bed pillows with memory foam polyester fiber firm fill to support your neck and head. The medium-firm density of this pillow makes it an excellent pick for stomach and back sleepers, and it's even machine washable to easily keep it fresh.

Casaluna™: Where calm and comfort are naturally at home.
